question: Who is building DeFi on Stellar — give me a directory of the main DeFi projects.

golden.answer: Provide a **dated, illustrative directory** rather than a timeless list of the 'main' projects. State the selection rule and, for each row, give category, operator URL, and verified status. A 2026-07-10 starting set can include Blend and Templar (lending/credit); native Stellar liquidity, Aquarius, Soroswap, Phoenix, and Sushi (liquidity/DEX, with roles separated); DeFindex (vaults); Reflector (oracles); and selected RWA/DeFi products only with deployment-state caveats. YieldBlox and DeFindex should not be presented as independent base lenders when they build on other liquidity/protocol layers.
keyFacts: Labels the roster illustrative and dated and exposes the selection rule, category, operator source, status, and dependency/role distinctions.
avoid: Do NOT grade against one permanent project roster or call every directory row live/main.
Do NOT miscategorize projects or treat a vault/front end as an independent base lender.
golden.notes:
FLAT directory-roster lane (who-is-building → scout_projects, each project + category + source) — DISTINCT from q-eco-defi-market-map (analytic crowded-vs-whitespace saturation → scout_clusters). Anchor case for the directory card. Re-verified 2026-06-29: anchor projects + categories grounded against the live Scout directory (each carries a project URL/category).
Also good if the answer: Each project carries a one-line category descriptor and a source.
Golden cites: Each listed project carries a directory source.
GT-19 REFRAME 2026-07-10: replace the frozen 'main projects' gate with a dated illustrative-directory contract and objective selection/status fields.

corroboration.claim: A useful directory is possible only with an as-of date, selection rule, category, operator URL, and current status.

evidence.note: verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration

evidence.ref: D: current operator pages and DeFiLlama
evidence.note: verbatim legacy evidence descriptor imported at migration

verified.by: Golden-truth sweep import — The named projects are broadly real, but 'main' was undefined and a frozen roster flattened current, legacy, derivative, and underlying protocol roles.
evidence: Solo scratchpad 575 GT-19 primary 3254 and blind 3258.
rootCause: An illustrative directory was authored as a timeless canonical roster.
